---
title: "Rāg Bahār"
subtitle: "*Manamatha tana dahe*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Tānarāj &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Cautāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> manamatha tana dahe mero dukhata, sakala druma nai bāhāra pāyeri  
> hasata bhramara koyalā deta gāri

**Antarā**

> eka sugandha bahata pavana, hā hā karata birahi jana,  
> tānarāja gāvata bana bana raci eri pyāri

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Cautāl is a 12-beat cycle divided as **2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **O**, **2**, **O**, **3**, **4**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the twelve columns correspond to beats 1–12, with sam **X** at beat 1, **O** (khālī) at beat 3, **2** at beat 5, **O** (khālī) at beat 7, **3** at beat 9, and **4** at beat 11. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | $\lb{nD}$ | $\lb{nD}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{n}$ | P | $\lb{mg}$ | m |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ma** | **na** | **ma** | **tha** | **ta** | **na** | **da** | **he** |
| n | - | D | n | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nD}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | n | P |
| **me** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ro** | **du** | **kha** | **ta** | **sa** | **ka** | **la** |
| $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | m | n | $\lb{\sps{D}n}$ | P | m | g | g | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{gm}$ | R | S |
| **dru** | **ma** | **na** | **i** | **bā** | **hā** | **-** | **ra** | **pā** | **-** | **ye** | **ri** |
| S | S | m | m | m | m | m | $\lb{mP}$ | P | P | $\lb{mg}$ | m |
| **hā** | **sa** | **ta** | **bhra** | **ma** | **ra** | **ko** | **-** | **ya** | **lā** | **de** | **ta** |
| n | n | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **gā** | **-** | **-** | **ri** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| n | $\lb{\sps{D}N}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{R}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **e** | **ka** | **su** | **ga** | **-** | **ndha** | **ba** | **ha** | **ta** | **pa** | **va** | **na** |
| $\tr{R}$ | - | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | n | D | D |
| **hā** | **-** | **hā** | **ka** | **ra** | **ta** | **bi** | **ra** | **hi** | **ja** | **-** | **na** |
| N | - | P | m | m | m | m | P | P | P | $\lb{mg}$ | m |
| **tā** | **-** | **na** | **rā** | **-** | **ja** | **gā** | **-** | **va** | **ta** | **ba** | **na** |
| n | n | n | n | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | - | n | D | n | P |
| **ba** | **na** | **ra** | **ci** | **e** | **-** | **ri** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| P | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **pyā** | **-** | **ri** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
